Catalog/Instruments/LATITUD Cement Restrictor
InstrumentsREF: CRAG-XX/XX

LATITUD Cement Restrictor

LATITUD · Orthopedic Accessories

Cement restrictors used to limit cement penetration during cemented femoral stem procedures. Available in small and medium sizes for different canal dimensions.

MaterialBiocompatible Polymer
Frequently Asked Questions

Cement restrictors used to limit cement penetration during cemented femoral stem procedures. Available in small and medium sizes for different canal dimensions.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the LATITUD Cement Restrictor, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The LATITUD Cement Restrictor is constructed using Biocompatible Polymer, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
